research.title: Claude Code Headless Mode: The Complete CI/CD Automation Playbook
research.whyTrending: Headless mode with -p flag unlocks CI pipelines, pre-commit hooks, GitHub Actions. Scheduled Tasks launched Q1 2026 let Claude run cloud jobs. Most tutorials cover basic claude -p but miss --bare, --output-format stream-json, and production patterns like error recovery and token budgeting in CI
